name: Century: Age of Ashes
description:
Century: Age of Ashes is a 2021 free-to-play(but with some pay to win things) dragon aerial combat video game developed and published by Playwing Bordeaux and released on December 2, 2021 for Microsoft Windows and on March 10, 2022 for Xbox Series X/S. It launched for Xbox One on July 12, 2022, and for PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 on September 26, 2022. Mobile versions of the game for iOS and Android released on June 21, 2023.

(The season 3 is currently stopped since June :'/ )

NO I wasn't paid to do that. Really, I did that out of my will because I got inspired when i FINNALY buyed the game pass.

I don't know somethings so...it's almost fanmade OK?!

Classes:

Marauder, relentless hunters: Free from any allegiance to kingdom or homeland, the Marauders are merciless hunters and skilled dragon traders. Using their riding skills to track living beings...they never give up on their prey.

Windguard, Celestial Guardian: Trained to defend the greatest kingdom on earth, the Windguard is the backbone of the Skeld army. An order of protective knights, they use their powers of mounts to defend their allies at any cost.

Phantom, Shadow's assasin: Born in the East, rumor has it that the Phantoms are the sole heirs of the first orders of dragon riders. They ride mysterious beasts covered in thorns, capable of escaping or causing death at any moment thanks to their ability to camouflage themselves in the sky.

Stormraiser, Elemental Berserk: Both spiritual guides and guardians of the Valkurian mountain range, the Stormraisers maintain a tradition that dates back several eras. Despite their dwindling numbers, their mastery of storms grants them the strength of hundreds.

Thornweaver, Sylvan Sentinela: Living in a forest cradle hidden from civilization, the Thornweaver are sworn guardians of a form of dragonwork. Their willow composition and symbiosis with Nature itself allows them to summon the strength of elders.

The dragon classes are the: Bloodchasers, Ironwings, Nightshaggers, Vinedrakes, Stonesnouts, Strongscales

I know theres a lot more of dragons but I still have no information about them, so I put the ones I have.
creator: Killumbra
